VSVaraSplitsplit and payout proofs
Simple shared expenses

Split costs. Prove payments.

No confusion. No screenshots. Track, pay, claim, and share one clean proof.

Create Group
Open Group
Track costs
Pay safely
Share proof

Choose your flow

Two ways to create proof

Split a shared bill with friends, or create a formal on-chain payment record for work.

Split Expenses

Share costs with a group

Add expenses, calculate who pays whom, fund escrow, and keep a verified proof.

Create Group

Work & Payouts

Pay work and share proof

Fund freelance, bounty, salary, or custom payouts and create a shareable proof.

How it works

A calmer way to close shared costs

VaraSplit keeps the money flow simple: record costs, fund the plan, then claim what you are owed.

Add expenses

Create a group and record who paid for what.

Fund safely

VaraSplit turns shared costs into one clean payment plan.

Keep proof

The final record stays available from the contract.

Verified, not remembered

Payment and proof status reload from contract data.

You can refresh the page and still see who owes what, who can claim, and where the explorer proof lives.

Already started?

Open a group

Enter the group number. Balances, deposits, claims, and proof status load from the contract.

Trust layer

Every important state comes from chain.
